title: Fix warthog ghosting canvas clear bug

log.context: Fix warthog ghosting canvas clear bug

Done. Here's exactly what was wrong and what changed:

**Root cause:** The `loop()` function drew `ctx.drawImage(mapCache, 0, 0)` at the start of each frame to stamp the static map onto the main canvas — but it never called `ctx.clearRect()` first. The mapCache contains tiles with transparent pixels (trees and rocks have no grass fill in their tile cells). Those transparent regions of the cached map image don't overwrite the main canvas pixels beneath them, so warthog pixels from the prior frame...(truncated)
